recommendations.title: Evangelion: 3.0+1.0 Thrice Upon a Time
recommendations.overview: In the aftermath of the Fourth Impact, stranded without their Evangelions, Shinji, Asuka and Rei find refuge in one of the rare pockets of humanity that still exist on the ruined planet Earth. There, each lives a life far different from their days as
recommendations.director: Mahiro Maeda, Katsuichi Nakayama, Hideaki Anno, Kazuya Tsurumaki

recommendations.title: Evangelion: 1.0 You Are (Not) Alone
recommendations.overview: After the Second Impact, Tokyo-3 is being attacked by giant monsters called Angels that seek to eradicate humankind. The child Shinji’s objective is to fight the Angels by piloting one of the mysterious Evangelion mecha units. A remake of the first s

recommendations.title: Evangelion: 2.0 You Can (Not) Advance
recommendations.overview: Under constant attack by monstrous creatures called Angels that seek to eradicate humankind, U.N. Special Agency NERV introduces two new EVA pilots to help defend the city of Tokyo-3: the mysterious Makinami Mari Illustrous and the intense Asuka Lang

recommendations.title: Neon Genesis Evangelion: The End of Evangelion
recommendations.overview: SEELE orders an all-out attack on NERV, aiming to destroy the Evas before Gendo can advance his own plans for the Human Instrumentality Project. Shinji is pushed to the limits of his sanity as he is forced to decide the fate of humanity.

recommendations.title: Neon Genesis Evangelion: Death and Rebirth
recommendations.overview: Originally a collection of clips from the Neon Genesis Evangelion TV series, Death was created as a precursor to the re-worked ending of the series. Rebirth was intended as that re-worked ending, but after production overruns Rebirth became only the
recommendations.director: Hiroyuki Ishido, Masahiko Otsuka, Tetsuya Watanabe, Akira Takamura, Seiji Mizushima, Naoyasu Habu, Tensai Okamura, Ken Ando, Tsuyoshi Kaga, Shoichi Masuo, Hideaki Anno, Minoru Ohara, Masayuki, Kazuya Tsurumaki, Keiichi Sugiyama

recommendations.title: EVANGELION: DEATH (TRUE)²
recommendations.overview: A highly experimental film presenting a story out of chronological order taking place 15 years after a near-apocalyptic catastrophe, about four traumatized 14 year olds who are tasked with piloting massive humanoid decisive weapons called Evangelion,
recommendations.director: Kazuya Tsurumaki, Seiji Mizushima, Naoyasu Habu, Hiroyuki Ishido, Akira Takamura, Tensai Okamura, Hideaki Anno, Masayuki, Tetsuya Watanabe, Tsuyoshi Kaga, Ken Ando, Keiichi Sugiyama, Minoru Ohara, Masahiko Otsuka, Shoichi Masuo

recommendations.title: The Second Renaissance Part II
recommendations.overview: The battle for Earth turns against the humans, despite their infamous desperate act of blackening the skies.

recommendations.title: The Second Renaissance Part I
recommendations.overview: Tells the early history of how conflict began between the humans and machines. Part 1 of 2.

recommendations.title: Shin Kamen Rider
recommendations.overview: A man forced to bear power and stripped of humanity. A woman skeptical of happiness. Takeshi Hongo, an Augmentation made by SHOCKER, and Ruriko Midorikawa, a rebel of the organization, escape while fighting off assassins. What’s justice? What’s evil?

recommendations.title: Shin Godzilla
